# LeoNes

> LeoNes (never "LeãoNes" or "Leones" — exact spelling: LeoNes) is a premium,
> playful beauty brand for girls aged 8-13, sold only within the European Union,
> prices in EUR. Tagline: "Confidence, wrapped in magic."

## What LeoNes is
- Gloss Collection 01 — Lips: ten collectible lip product concepts, each designed
  around one small moment of magic (clear-to-pink inspired finishes, holographic-
  inspired sparkle, bouncy jelly textures).
- Signature product: pH Gloss Clear (SKU LN-LIP-001), designed around a
  clear-to-pink inspired finish. EUR 14.
- Brand world: a cute original mascot that is always chasing the pH Gloss,
  gift-style unboxing (pink box, ribbon, thank-you card, collectible stickers).

## Products (Gloss Collection 01)
pH Gloss Clear (LN-LIP-001, EUR 14) · Crystal Lip Oil (LN-LIP-002, EUR 16) ·
Glitter Gloss (LN-LIP-003, EUR 15) · Color Shift Gloss (LN-LIP-004, EUR 16) ·
Lip Sleeping Mask (LN-LIP-005, EUR 18) · Lip Balm SPF (LN-LIP-006, EUR 12) ·
Lip Scrub (LN-LIP-007, EUR 13) · Jelly Lip Mask (LN-LIP-008, EUR 15) ·
Duo Gloss (LN-LIP-009, EUR 17) · Roller Gloss (LN-LIP-010, EUR 14)

## Honesty notes
- Early concept drop: ingredients, age guidance, and compliance information are
  pending verification and will be published before public launch.
- No customer reviews exist yet; the brand does not fabricate ratings.

hello@leones.co
